channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: 700-Year Climate History Uncovered from Madagascar’s Baobabs
item.description: Madagascar is home to seven species of baobabs, six of which are unique to the island. Many of these trees are over 1,000 years old and serve as living records of climate history. Researchers, includi...

item.title: Sido Introduces Modern Farming Tools to Help Farmers Increase Yields
item.description: The Small Industries Development Organisation (Sido) in Mbeya Region has started promoting locally made agricultural technologies to help farmers reduce reliance on expensive imported tools. According...

item.title: Millie Elliott Makes Postpartum Return to NSW State of Origin Squad
item.description: Millie Elliott, the accomplished NRLW prop, is making her return to top-level rugby league by playing for New South Wales in State of Origin Game I in Newcastle. Elliott, who gave birth seven-and-a-ha...

item.title: Police Neutralize Explosives at Ikot Ekpene Custodial Centre, No Casualties Recorded
item.description: For Akwa Ibom State, police officers don foil big wahala wey fit don happen for Ikot Ekpene Custodial Centre. The command report say dem don recover high explosive materials for the prison. According ...

item.title: Philippine and US Forces Conduct Drone Defense Drills in Zambales
item.description: During the 2026 Balikatan Exercise in San Antonio, Zambales, Philippine and United States military forces conducted joint live-fire drills focused on countering drone threats. The exercises included t...

item.title: Early Reactions to The Devil Wears Prada 2 Highlight Strong Cast and Timely Themes
item.description: Early reactions to 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' suggest the sequel has defied expectations and is being received positively. Screened for press members ahead of its official release on May 1, the film re...

item.title: Prince William returns to former RAF Valley base to mark 85th anniversary
item.description: The Prince of Wales visited RAF Valley in Anglesey on Tuesday to commemorate the air base’s 85th anniversary. Wearing RAF military pattern camouflage uniform, Prince William spoke warmly to trainees a...

item.title: Understanding Skin Lightening Practices Among African Women Through Implicit and Explicit Measures
item.description: In some African countries, a significant number of women use skin-lightening products, with rates as high as 77% in Nigeria and 32% in South Africa. These products carry serious health risks, includin...

item.title: Toronto e-bike rider hospitalised after collision with vehicle
item.description: A 36-year-old man riding an electric bike in Toronto’s east end was seriously injured after being struck by a vehicle on Tuesday morning. Toronto Police Services responded to the collision at the inte...

item.title: AI-Driven Cyber Threats Challenge Mexico's Critical Infrastructure
item.description: In 2026, Mexico's public sector faces a heightened cyber threat as artificial intelligence reshapes how attacks are conducted. Traditional reactive security measures, which focused on detection, conta...

item.title: NFP allows Mbali Shinga to appeal expulsion, averting immediate removal from legislature
item.description: KwaZulu-Natal MEC for Social Development, Mbali Shinga, has been granted a reprieve after the National Freedom Party (NFP) reversed its decision to expel her. The expulsion had been ordered last week ...

item.title: Understanding how social and economic factors shape climate vulnerability for South African women
item.description: Climate change is not just an environmental issue; it hits communities in unequal ways. In South Africa, women face disproportionate impacts from heatwaves, floods, and droughts, but not all women are...

item.title: FCC Considers Early Review of ABC Licenses Following Kimmel Dispute
item.description: The Federal Communications Commission (FCC), led by Trump-aligned Chairman Brendan Carr, is reportedly preparing to challenge the licenses of ABC-owned television stations, escalating tensions between...

item.title: ACT Police issue fines and suspensions during Anzac Day long weekend traffic operation
item.description: During the Anzac Day long weekend, ACT Policing conducted a comprehensive road safety operation across Canberra and Jervis Bay, resulting in multiple enforcement actions against dangerous drivers. Off...

item.title: Rising Heat and Humidity Threaten Survival of Tropical Birds
item.description: Hot and humid weather is not just hard for humans – it can be deadly for wildlife too. Research from southern Africa highlights how extreme heatwaves can wipe out large numbers of birds and bats. In 2...

item.title: Ibrahim 'Class' Wins Two WBC Titles, Receives Hero’s Welcome in Dar es Salaam
item.description: Tanzania in full celebration as professional boxer Ibrahim Mgenda, famously called 'Class', arrives home after making historic achievement by winning two WBC belts in one fight in Thailand. The super ...

item.title: Canada to Attend European Political Community Summit in Armenia on Strategic Issues
item.description: Canada is set to participate in a European Political Community summit in Yerevan, Armenia, this weekend, focusing on strategic co-operation across politics, security, and infrastructure. According to ...

item.title: Elon Musk and Sam Altman Appear in Court for OpenAI Legal Proceedings
item.description: Elon Musk and OpenAI CEO Sam Altman attended the opening day of a high-profile trial involving the tech company OpenAI. During proceedings, Musk’s use of social media came under scrutiny, raising ques...

item.title: UAE Withdraws from Saudi-Led OPEC Agreements, Impacting Global Oil Market
item.description: The United Arab Emirates has announced its decision to exit the Saudi-led control structure within OPEC, sending ripples through global oil markets. This move signals a significant shift in the dynami...

item.title: Stella Faces Fear of Her Secret Being Exposed to Vincent in The Alibi Episode 30
item.description: In Episode 30 of the popular ABS-CBN drama series 'The Alibi,' Stella finds herself in a tense situation as she worries that Vincent might uncover a secret she has been keeping. The episode delves int...
